title: The Desert Penitent Who Crossed the Jordan
usage_rules: Prefer Wikimedia Commons categories and file pages with explicit license/public-domain information.
For modern icons/photos, keep attribution and license in asset_attribution.json.
Do not assume every icon image is free just because the saint is old; verify the file page license.
Use icons reverently: no distorted faces, no mocking zooms, no sensational effects.
Mix icon/portrait assets with monastery exteriors, manuscripts, maps, candles, and landscape footage to avoid a static slideshow.
